task_completion.description: Verify that educational bookmarks are organized into folders by subject area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome bookmark bar or bookmark manager (chrome://bookmarks) showing folders named after academic subject areas (e.g., Math, Science, History) containing saved links.

task_completion.description: Verify that safe search shortcuts are configured in the browser settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings page for 'Manage search engines and site search' (chrome://settings/searchEngines) showing safe search engines added or specific site search shortcuts configured.

task_completion.description: Verify that content restrictions are configured for student safety.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings page for 'Privacy and security' showing Enhanced Safe Browsing enabled (chrome://settings/security), or specific site settings/restrictions applied (chrome://settings/content).

task_completion.description: Verify that appropriate startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings page for 'On startup' (chrome://settings/onStartup) showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected with one or more educational URLs listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that download policies for student materials are established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome settings page for 'Downloads' (chrome://settings/downloads) showing a specific designated folder for student materials and/or the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggle set appropriately.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome browser window, settings pages, and bookmark manager being actively navigated and clicked.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Google Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard Google Chrome interface, not a text editor, mock-up, or a different web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing Chrome's underlying configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or text editors open with Chrome's 'Preferences' or 'Bookmarks' JSON files.
